sourceDescription: Decode a saved image or scan a barcode with your camera.
uploadDescription: Choose a local image and read barcodes or QR codes without uploading it.
chooseImageLabel: Drag and drop an image here, or click to upload
uploadHint: The image is decoded locally on this device.
supportedFormatsLabel: Supports QR Code, Data Matrix, PDF417, Aztec, Code 128, Code 39, EAN, UPC, ITF, and other common formats.
cameraDescription: Use the rear camera when available and keep the code flat inside the frame.
cameraIdleDescription: Start the camera, then point it at a barcode or QR code.
cameraScanningDescription: Hold the code steady, well lit, and inside the frame.
cameraUnsupportedDescription: This browser does not expose camera access for the page.
cameraPermissionDescription: Allow camera access in the browser and try again.
cameraErrorDescription: The camera could not be started. Try another browser or input method.
resultDescription: Review the decoded value, barcode format, and safe follow-up actions.
emptyResultDescription: Upload an image or start the camera to decode the first result.
decodeImageError: The image could not be decoded. Try a clearer image or another file format.
noBarcodeFoundError: No barcode or QR code was found in that image.
cameraFrameError: The camera frame could not be scanned.
